# Implementation Plan: Image Tools with Magick Cache

**Branch**: `013-image-tools-magick-cache` | **Date**: 2026-06-24 (revised post-converge) | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)

**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/013-image-tools-magick-cache/spec.md`

**Note**: Regenerated by `/speckit-plan` after `/speckit-analyze` and `/speckit-converge`. Prior tasks T001–T092 were marked complete but implementation remains foundational; Phase 9 convergence tasks (T093–T106) capture remaining work.

## Summary

Add a cohesive set of single-image and batch image processing tools (resize with dimensions/percent/fit/quality/filter; numeric crop WxH+X+Y with preview; format conversion with quality; safe batch rename with live preview) plus deep integration of ImageMagick Magick Cache.

Core goals from spec:
- Safe-by-default: always create new files (subfolder or suffixed) by default; explicit "backup originals + modify in place" requires multi-step confirmation.
- All actions logged to Activity Log; in-memory inventory updated so new/renamed/optimized assets appear immediately in the browser list.
- Magick Cache: detect via `tool_caps`, in-memory settings (enable, root, passkey path, TTL), automatic put of originals + every processed result using stable IRIs, get fallback, background "Pre-cache entire folder", and "Prepare Fast feh Viewing Cache" (materialize auto-orient + stripped + high-quality JPEG/PNG optimized versions, launch feh via temp filelist, expose materialized files as selectable assets).
- Constitution-aligned: thin-wrapper (never reimplement feh), external tools via `std::process::Command`, minimal deps, Linux/feh-centric, responsive UI (background threads + mpsc), graceful degradation.

**Technical approach**: Extend existing `tool_caps` for magick-cache detection. All image processing, cache management, and operation logic lives in the extended `image_proc` core module (pure functions, no egui, Command wrappers for magick + magick-cache, `image` crate fallback). Testable orchestration (rename patterns, batch planning, preview calculations, job harness) in `ui_logic`. No new top-level core module. UI only in `main.rs`. Reuse mpsc for background jobs. Materialize for feh per clarify Q1.

**Spec alignment note (FR-015)**: Plan and data-model treat resize fit modes (contain/cover/stretch) and filter choice as v1-required for professional tools; recommend a one-line spec edit to FR-015 if not done separately.

## Implementation Status (2026-06-24 converge assessment)

| Area | State | Evidence |
|------|-------|----------|
| Types (`FitMode`, `AssetStatus`, `CacheConfig`, etc.) | **Done** | `src/types.rs` |
| `tool_caps` magick-cache detection | **Done** | `src/tool_caps.rs` |
| `MagickCacheManager` put/materialize stubs | **Partial** | `src/image_proc.rs` — no get-before-compute |
| `ImageToolsService` | **Partial** | Stub `process_single`; no batch/rename/prepare |
| `ui_logic` inventory helper | **Partial** | `add_or_update_asset_in_inventory` only |
| Single/Batch/Rename/Cache UI | **Missing** | `render_inspector_image_tools` is skeleton |
| Integration + perf tests | **Missing** | No `tests/integration/`, `tests/perf/` |
| Unit test wiring | **Partial** | `tests/unit/image_proc.rs` not in `Cargo.toml` |

**Next execution path**: `/speckit-implement` on Phase 9 (T093–T106) in `tasks.md`.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: Rust (edition 2021, stable toolchain; matches existing Cargo.toml and constitution).

**Primary Dependencies**: egui 0.30 + eframe 0.30 (glow backend), walkdir 2, image 0.25 (jpeg/png/webp/rayon), which 6, rfd 0.15. New work uses only `std::process::Command` for magick + magick-cache. Optional `regex` crate for rename pattern parsing only if std parsing proves insufficient (justify in Cargo.toml comment).

**Storage**: Filesystem (user image folders + temp dirs for materialized cache exports). In-memory session state (inventory, selections, cache config, mpsc job handles). No database.

**Testing**: `cargo test` with mandatory unit tests for `image_proc`, `ui_logic`, `tool_caps` (constitution). Integration tests in `tests/integration/image_tools.rs`. Perf verification in `tests/perf/` using `scripts/generate-perf-fixture.sh`, `scripts/measure-resources.sh`, `scripts/sample-rss.sh` for SC-001/002/004/007.

**Target Platform**: Linux (primary; feh + ImageMagick 7+ with magick-cache on PATH). WSL/macOS secondary with graceful notes.

**Project Type**: desktop-app (single Rust binary + lib crate; egui/eframe GUI orchestrating feh + image tools + cache).

**Performance Goals**:
- Preserve existing: ~126–150 MiB RSS for 10k-image sessions (virtualized list, metadata-only).
- Background jobs (batch, pre-cache, prepare-fast) must keep egui responsive (mpsc + status pulse).
- Cache hit for identical op: <3s perceived (SC-002).
- Single op on 10–20MP photo: <30s end-to-end including list update (SC-001).
- Prepare fast on 2000+ images: background with progress; feh launch on optimized versions materially faster (SC-004).
- Rename preview 500+ files: <2s (SC-007).

**Constraints**:
- All external tools via unprivileged `std::process::Command`.
- Never reimplement feh features; "Prepare Fast" optimizes inputs only.
- Cache settings in-memory for v1.
- Crop: numeric WxH+X+Y + live preview only (no draggable rect in v1).
- Safe defaults: new files preferred; in-place requires double confirmation + backups.
- `ui_logic` returns raw pixels/geometry only; egui textures built in `main.rs`.

**Resize capabilities (v1)**: Absolute dimensions, percentage, fit modes (contain/cover/stretch), filter choice (Lanczos + alternatives), quality.

**Scale/Scope**: 10k+ image folders; batch on hundreds; pre-cache/prepare-fast on thousands; common formats + magick for others. Out of scope v1: interactive crop UI, persistent cache config, watermarking, cross-platform first-class.

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-checked after Phase 1 design and post-converge.*

| Principle | Status | Notes / Justification |
|-----------|--------|-----------------------|
| I. Thin-Wrapper Architecture | ✅ PASS | Tools prepare inputs for feh or produce sidecar files in the list. "Prepare Fast" materializes optimized versions for feh via existing launch + temp filelist. Never reimplements viewing/zoom/navigation/wallpaper. |
| II. Pure Rust, Minimal Dependencies | ✅ PASS | No heavy bindings. magick/magick-cache via Command. `image` crate fallback. Regex only if justified. Release profile unchanged. |
| III. Clean Module Separation | ✅ PASS (with documented scope expansion) | Extend `image_proc` for ops + cache (Command-based, no egui). `tool_caps` detection only. Helpers in `ui_logic` (zero egui types). UI in `main.rs` only. mpsc for background work. See Complexity Tracking for `image_proc` charter stretch beyond pure `image` crate. |
| IV. Linux-First, feh-Centric | ✅ PASS | Linux primary. magick + magick-cache optional enhancers. "Prepare Fast feh" is feh-centric killer feature. Graceful degradation when tools missing. |
| V. Performance Awareness | ✅ PASS | Long-running work on background threads + channels. Virtualized list preserved. Dedicated perf test tasks for SCs. |

No unjustified violations. Gates PASS.

**Post-Phase 1 / Post-Converge Re-evaluation**: Design unchanged. Converge confirmed foundation partial; user stories US1–US5 unbuilt despite prior task checkmarks. Phase 9 tasks align implementation with this plan.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/013-image-tools-magick-cache/
├── spec.md
├── plan.md              # This file
├── research.md          # Phase 0
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1 validation scenarios
├── contracts/           # UI + magick-cache contracts
│   ├── image-tools-ui.md
│   └── magick-cache-tool.md
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2 + Phase 9 Convergence
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
src/
├── lib.rs               # 5 core modules + re-exports (ImageToolsService)
├── main.rs              # egui App, Image Tools panel, job result pump
├── scanner.rs
├── image_proc.rs        # process_image, crop, cache manager, ImageToolsService
├── types.rs             # FitMode, OutputPolicy, CacheConfig, AssetStatus, etc.
├── ui_logic.rs          # rename expander, crop preview pixels, spawn_job, inventory
└── tool_caps.rs         # feh/magick/magick-cache detection

tests/
├── unit/
│   ├── image_proc.rs    # mandatory core tests (wire in Cargo.toml)
│   └── ui_logic.rs      # rename/crop/inventory tests
├── integration/
│   └── image_tools.rs   # e2e single/batch/cache/rename/prepare-fast
└── perf/                # SC-001/002/004/007 benchmarks

scripts/
├── generate-perf-fixture.sh
├── measure-resources.sh
└── sample-rss.sh
```

**Structure Decision**: Single Rust project. Extend `image_proc` (not a new `image_tools` core module). Prior `src/image_tools/` scaffolding removed. Stale `tests/unit/image_tools/` to be deleted in T093.

## Complexity Tracking

| Potential Violation | Why Needed / How Addressed | Simpler Alternative Rejected Because |
|---------------------|----------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| Adding 6th core module `image_tools` | Would violate constitution enumerated cores + test mandate | Rejected — extend `image_proc` instead |
| `image_proc` beyond "pure image crate" (Command wrappers, MagickCacheManager, ImageToolsService) | magick-cache integration and professional ops require subprocess + cache IRI management; no other listed core fits without new module | Keeping image_proc image-crate-only cannot deliver cache, prepare-fast, or exotic format routing |
| Optional `regex` for rename tokens | Robust `{counter:03}` parsing if std insufficient | Hand-rolled parser acceptable first; regex tiny if needed |
